titleStmt.title: SII 37.56: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 56. (A.R. No. B 368 of 1938-39.) Dēvuni-Kaḍapa, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Veṅkaṭēśa-perumāḷ temple.
This is dated in the cyclic year Paridhāvi, Jyēshṭha ba. 10. On the basis of palaeography and internal evidence the details of the date may be equated to 1552 A.D., June °16, Thursday.

It records the gift of 5 pañcha-pātras, vessels, bell, uddhariṇe and 6 images (svarūpālu) for which silver worth 15 varāhas was given to god Tiruvēṅgaḷanātha at Kaḍapa by Nāthappa, son of Tarugu Puṭṭayya and the rāyasam of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Naṁdyāla Avubhaḷēśvaradēvamahārāju for the merit of the latter.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . paridhāvi saṁvatsara jēṣṭa ba 10 śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Avubhaḷēśvaradēva mahārājula Ayyavāri
rāyasaṁ tarugu puṭṭayya komāruṁḍu nāthappaṁgāru kaḍapa tiruveṁgaḷanāthuniki sama¨rppiṁccina śāvavara padihēnu vara
hāla veṁḍḍini paṁccapātra giṁnnelu 5 vuddariṇi gaṁṭanni vubhayaṁ veṁḍḍi svarūpālu 6 Ārunnu padihēnu varahāla veṁḍini śē
yiṁcci sama¨rppiṁcenu [.] Avubhaḷarājayya vāriki puṇyaṁgānuṁnnutama tallitaṁḍrādulaku puṇyaṁgānu kaḍaparāyaniki sama¨rppiṁcenu .
Digital edition of SII 37.56 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
